location: A chest on the back of the southern of two parked carriages at Gatefront Ruins, guarded by a group of soldiers. (A second carriage nearby holds a Lordsworn's Greatsword instead — easy to conflate the two.)
tactics: Head to Gatefront Ruins, west of Agheel Lake North grace, early in Limgrave
Two carriages sit here — the chest with the Flail is on the southern one
A handful of Lordsworn soldiers guard the ruins; fight them or sneak/sprint past
No boss fight required — a straightforward early pickup
lore: A crude bludgeoning weapon favored by common soldiers — a spiked iron ball on a chain that tears flesh on impact rather than cutting, a nasty answer to armored or parry-happy enemies.

builds.name: Early hybrid quality
builds.why: D Strength / D Dexterity — an even split works as an early quality or stopgap bleed pick before better flails show up
